c.d: The range of devices and operating systems on which the app is available.
c.s: App Store, Google Play Store, Official App Websites

c.d: The design, ease of navigation, and overall user experience of the app.
The variety and usefulness of features offered, such as offline listening, playlist creation, and playback controls.
The size and diversity of the podcast library available through the app.
The clarity and fidelity of audio playback provided by the app.
The app's ability to provide personalized content suggestions based on user preferences.
The app's compatibility and integration with other platforms and services, such as smart speakers or social media.
The pricing structure, including free and premium subscription options.
The ability to download episodes for offline listening.
Feedback and ratings from users regarding their experiences with the app.
c.s: App Store, Google Play Store, User Review Platforms
